text: What exact copyright year and legal holder name must appear in the root MIT LICENSE and packaged copies?
why_it_matters: The MIT license choice is accepted, but repository metadata is not authoritative legal identity data; public packages must contain a final owner-approved notice.
unlocks: Completion of the public-packaging portion of the M0 governance and release gate.
options: Supply the exact legal holder name and copyright year for all root and packaged MIT notices.
Have the release owner obtain counsel-approved notice wording before public packaging.
default: Do not infer or ship placeholder values; require owner-supplied holder and year in specs/11-governance-release.md and block public packaging until both are supplied.

answer.text: Use Copyright (c) 2026 Loic Schneider in the root MIT LICENSE and packaged copies.
answer.rationale: q-0002 duplicates the holder/year clarification already answered authoritatively by the human owner in q-0001; no new answer was requested.
